assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 7 task files (task-1 through task-7) contain every required section. Task 1: Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Create (line 7), Files to Modify (line 10), Implementation Notes (line 13), Acceptance Criteria (line 24), Test Requirements (line 30). Task 2: Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Modify (line 7), Implementation Notes (line 13), Acceptance Criteria (line 29), Test Requirements (line 37). Task 3: Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Create (line 7), Files to Modify (line 10), Implementation Notes (line 17), Acceptance Criteria (line 30), Test Requirements (line 37). Task 4: Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Modify (line 7), Implementation Notes (line 11), Acceptance Criteria (line 22), Test Requirements (line 29). Task 5: Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Modify (line 7), Implementation Notes (line 10), Acceptance Criteria (line 24), Test Requirements (line 30). Task 6: Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Create (line 7), Files to Modify (line 10), Implementation Notes (line 13), Acceptance Criteria (line 28), Test Requirements (line 34). Task 7: Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Modify (line 7), Implementation Notes (line 13), Acceptance Criteria (line 23), Test Requirements (line 28).

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 7 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-severity-aggregation-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-integration.md, task-5-cache-invalidation.md, task-6-integration-tests.md, task-7-api-documentation.md. 7 is within the range [3, 10].

Every task file's Repository section contains exactly 'trustify-backend': Task 1 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 2 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 3 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 4 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 5 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 6 line 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 7 line 2: 'trustify-backend'.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph extracted from task files: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 1 and Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 4. Task 6 depends on Task 3 and Task 5. Task 7 depends on Task 3. This forms a directed acyclic graph: 1->2->3->4->5->6, 1->3->7. Topological ordering exists (1,2,3,4,5,7,6), confirming no cycles.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Files to Modify that exist in the repo-backend.md manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (task 1, manifest line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (task 2, manifest line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (tasks 3 & 4, manifest line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (task 5, manifest line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (task 6, manifest line 114), README.md (task 7, manifest line 5). Task 4 also modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs which is created in task 3. Files to Create are in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (task 1, parent dir at manifest line 40-43), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (task 3, parent dir at manifest line 47-50), tests/api/advisory_summary.rs (task 6, parent dir at manifest line 110-113).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md lists 7 specific changes under 'trustify-backend: changes:'. Each change names specific structs, methods, endpoints, or behaviors: (1) 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields: critical, high, medium, low, total', (2) 'Add severity aggregation query method to SbomService that joins sbom_advisory and advisory tables, groups by severity, and returns deduplicated counts', (3) 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint with optional ?threshold query parameter', (4) 'Add 5-minute cache layer to the advisory-summary endpoint using tower-http caching middleware', (5) 'Add cache invalidation hook in advisory ingestion pipeline to clear cached summaries when new advisories are linked to an SBOM', (6) 'Add integration tests for the advisory-summary endpoint covering: success response, 404 for missing SBOM, severity deduplication, threshold filtering, cache behavior', (7) 'Update API documentation to include the new endpoint path, parameters, and response shape'. All changes reference specific entities, paths, parameters, or technical details.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 7 tasks have a '## Repository' section followed by exactly one repository name 'trustify-backend' on the next line. No task lists multiple repositories. Task 1 line 1-2: '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'. Same pattern in tasks 2-7.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 7 tasks contain '## Description', '## Acceptance Criteria', and '## Test Requirements' sections. Task 1: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 24, Test Requirements at line 30. Task 2: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 29, Test Requirements at line 37. Task 3: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 30, Test Requirements at line 37. Task 4: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 22, Test Requirements at line 29. Task 5: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 24, Test Requirements at line 30. Task 6: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 28, Test Requirements at line 34. Task 7: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 23, Test Requirements at line 28.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths correspond to files listed in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (manifest line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (manifest line 46, comment: 'SbomService: fetch, list, ingest'), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (manifest line 48, comment: 'Route registration: /api/v2/sbom'), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (manifest line 83, comment: 'Advisory ingestion: parse, store, correlate'), tests/Cargo.toml (manifest line 114), README.md (manifest line 5). Task 4 also modifies advisory_summary.rs created in task 3. All Files to Create are new files placed in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ (manifest lines 40-43), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (manifest lines 47-50), tests/api/ (manifest lines 110-113). No invented or non-existent paths detected.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Implementation Notes reference: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs (SbomSummary), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs (SbomDetails), modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs (AdvisorySummary severity field), common/src/model/paginated.rs, and specific derive macros (Serialize, Deserialize, Clone, Debug). Task 2 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (SbomService: fetch, list, ingest), entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, common/src/error.rs (AppError), and SeaORM query builder methods (select_only, column, group_by). Task 3 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs (GET /api/v2/sbom/{id} handler pattern), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (route registration), common/src/error.rs (AppError IntoResponse), Axum's Query<T> extractor. Task 4 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs cache layer configuration and tower-http caching middleware. Task 5 references: modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (ingestion pipeline), entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs (join table), modules/ingestor/src/service/mod.rs (IngestorService), and error handling with Result<T, AppError>. Task 6 references: tests/api/sbom.rs, tests/api/advisory.rs, assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK) pattern, and sbom_advisory join table. Task 7 references: README.md and existing API endpoint documentation style.
